channel.title: bothSidesHeadlinesNLtech
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from bothSidesHeadlinesNLtech, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Best Merino Wool T-Shirts of 2026: Top Picks from Ibex, Icebreaker, and Unbound Merino
item.description: A roundup of highly rated merino wool t-shirts from leading brands, evaluated for durability, comfort, and everyday versatility.

item.title: Spyware Vendor Found Distributing Fake Android Apps to Install Surveillance Software
item.description: Security researchers have uncovered another instance of a commercial spyware company using fraudulent Android applications to covertly install tracking software on targeted devices.

item.title: Raya Applicants Report Waiting Years for Admission to Exclusive Dating App
item.description: Some prospective users of the members-only dating platform Raya say they have been on the waiting list for two years or longer with no response.

item.title: Meta Signs Deal for Millions of Amazon AI Processors for Agentic Workloads
item.description: Meta has secured a large allocation of Amazon's proprietary CPUs for AI agent applications, a move analysts say signals a new phase in the competition for AI computing resources.

item.title: Nothing Launches On-Device AI Dictation Tool Supporting Over 100 Languages
item.description: Consumer electronics company Nothing has released a new AI-powered dictation feature that processes speech locally on the device and supports more than 100 languages.
